chapter_title.en: The Reward of one who Feeds a Believer, Quenches his Thirst, Clothes him or Pays off his Debt

parts.text: وعن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال

text: : ما من مؤمن يدخل بيته مؤمنين يطعمهما ويشبعهما: إلا كان ذلك أفضل من عتق نسمة.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 160. It has been narrated that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: If two believers were to enter the house of a believer and he were to feed them to full, this would be better than freeing a slave.”
